allowance.description:
Implements CW20 "allowance" extension.
Returns how much spender can use from owner account, 0 if unset.

balance.description: Implements CW20. Returns the current balance of the given address, 0 if unset.

curve_info.description: Returns the reserve and supply quantities, as well as the spot price to buy 1 token

token_info.description: Implements CW20. Returns metadata on the contract - name, decimals, supply, etc.
